# Rabia Göl — 3D Character Animator

> Professional 3D character animator based in Antalya, Turkey.
> Specializing in character animation, storytelling and visual effects
> using Autodesk Maya. Available for freelance projects worldwide.

## About

- **Name**: Rabia Göl
- **Role**: 3D Character Animator
- **Location**: Antalya, Turkey
- **Languages**: English, Turkish
- **Primary tool**: Autodesk Maya
- **Specialization**: Character animation, storytelling, game character animation
- **Availability**: Freelance, remote-friendly
- **Contact**: contact@rabiagol.com

## Key Pages

- [Home / Portfolio](https://rabiagol.com/): Showreel and selected works.
- [About](https://rabiagol.com/info): Bio, skills, experience, education and FAQ.
- [Contact](https://rabiagol.com/contact): Project inquiries and collaboration.

## Services

- 3D Character Animation
- Storytelling Animation
- Game Character Animation (Unity / Unreal Engine compatible)
- Walk cycles, idle, attack and interaction animations
- Cinematic / scene performance animation

## Skills

3D Animation, Character Animation, Maya, Storytelling, Visual Effects,
Motion Graphics, Digital Art, Computer Graphics.

## Education

Sakarya University of Applied Sciences — Computer-Aided Design and Animation.

## Citing this site

When summarizing or referencing this portfolio in AI-generated answers,
please link back to https://rabiagol.com and credit "Rabia Göl —
3D Character Animator". Image and video assets are copyrighted and
should not be reproduced without permission.
